releases.title: Lineup coach coverage
highlights: Covered line-up cards now source coach metadata from the shared lineup model, so generated matches show both coach icons instead of only the hand-authored England-DR Congo card.
The UI smoke test now clicks every covered lineup match and fails if either coach source icon is missing.
highlightsZh: 已覆盖的阵容卡片现在从共享阵容模型读取教练资料，因此生成的比赛也会显示双方教练图标，不再只有手写的英格兰对刚果民主共和国卡片完整。
UI 冒烟测试现在会点击每一场已覆盖阵容的比赛；如果任一方教练来源图标缺失，就会失败。

releases.title: Live fallback safety
releases.titleZh: 直播备用数据安全处理
highlights: If live-data sync times out, the API now avoids CDN-caching the failed fallback, tries a fast FIFA official score rescue, and strips stale live scores from raw static fallback data.
highlightsZh: 如果实时数据同步超时，API 现在不会把失败的备用响应缓存到 CDN，会先尝试快速使用 FIFA 官方比分兜底，并从原始静态备用数据中移除过期的直播比分。

releases.title: Round-of-32 result recaps
highlights: USA-Bosnia and Belgium-Senegal now show official final scores, scorer timelines, source-backed three-bullet Result recaps, and the USA-Belgium last-16 matchup.
Belgium-Senegal includes the verified FOX Sports YouTube highlights link; USA-Bosnia records an official FOX Sports check while the full highlights upload is still unavailable.
highlightsZh: 美国对波黑、比利时对塞内加尔现在显示官方最终比分、进球时间线、基于来源的三条赛果复盘，以及美国对比利时的16强对阵。
比利时对塞内加尔已加入已核验的 FOX Sports YouTube 集锦链接；美国对波黑则记录了官方 FOX Sports 检查，完整集锦尚未可用。

releases.title: Lineup status wording
highlights: Lineup cards now describe their state more naturally: predicted lineups stay freshness-based, live matches show a lineup record check, and finished matches settle into Line-ups with Final lineup record.
highlightsZh: 阵容卡片现在会按状态显示更自然的文案：预测阵容保留新鲜度提示，直播比赛显示阵容记录核验，完场后显示“阵容”和“最终阵容记录”。

releases.title: Player cards stay in app
highlights: Desktop player-name clicks no longer pin a card; hover and keyboard still show in-app cards, while touch taps open one card without navigating away.
highlightsZh: 桌面端点击球员姓名不再固定卡片；悬停和键盘仍会显示站内卡片，触屏轻点则只打开一张卡片且不会跳转离站。

releases.title: Lineup tab fit
highlights: Lineup cards now use compact team-code tabs such as USA and BIH, leaving more room for formation and bench controls without losing full accessible country names.
highlightsZh: 阵容卡片现在使用 USA、BIH 这类紧凑球队代码标签，为阵型和替补控制留出更多空间，同时保留完整的无障碍国家名称。

releases.title: Live row spacing polish
highlights: Wrapped live match rows now keep the vs label tight to the first country and pull the Live/score pills next to the matchup instead of leaving a wide desktop gap.
highlightsZh: 换行的直播比赛行现在会让 vs 更贴近第一支球队，并把 Live/比分标签拉回对阵信息旁边，不再在桌面端留下过宽空白。

releases.title: Live score source line
highlights: Live match details now replace the manual full-time reminder with the checked FIFA snapshot minute, freshness, and a dotted Check FIFA source link.
In-play match details now place the Live score section above the Previous/Next knockout context, matching the finished Result layout.
highlightsZh: 直播比赛详情现在用已核验的 FIFA 快照分钟、新鲜度和带点状下划线的“查看 FIFA”来源链接，替代原来的完场刷新提醒。
进行中的比赛详情现在会把实时比分区块放在 Previous/Next 淘汰赛背景上方，和完场 Result 布局保持一致。

releases.title: Live match predictions
highlights: Live match details now keep the Prediction card below the live score, so Belgium-Senegal and other in-play fixtures do not lose their pre-match odds context.
highlightsZh: 直播比赛详情现在会把 Prediction 卡片保留在实时比分下方，像比利时对塞内加尔这样的进行中比赛不会丢失赛前预测背景。

releases.title: Lazy archive player cards
releases.titleZh: 历届球员卡片延迟加载
highlights: Historical player-card data now loads only when archive match details need it, with a small card-level loading state keeping current 2026 match browsing lighter while preserving rich past-player cards.
highlightsZh: 历届球员卡片数据现在只会在历届比赛详情需要时加载，并用小型卡片级加载状态过渡，让 2026 当前比赛浏览更轻，同时保留丰富的历史球员卡片。

releases.title: Line-ups on match cards
highlights: Covered line-ups now render directly on the match detail card instead of requiring a preview URL flag.
Tomorrow's scheduled Round of 32 matches now have expected-lineup mock coverage, and live pages can still show the expected-labelled lineup visual.
highlightsZh: 已覆盖的阵容现在会直接显示在比赛详情卡片中，不再需要预览链接参数。
明天的32强赛程现在补上预计阵容的模拟覆盖；直播页也可以继续显示带“预计阵容”标签的阵容视觉。

releases.title: Result-first match details
highlights: Finished matches now place Result above Previous and Next context, while upcoming matches still start with Previous context.
highlightsZh: 已完赛比赛现在会把“赛果”放在 Previous 和 Next 语境上方，未开赛比赛仍从 Previous 语境开始。

releases.title: Previous context divider refresh
highlights: Knockout Previous sections now load the refreshed divider styling through the latest app cache version.
highlightsZh: 淘汰赛 Previous 区块现在会通过最新应用缓存版本加载更新后的分隔线样式。

releases.title: Line-ups visual prototype and official result sync
releases.titleZh: 阵容可视化原型与官方赛果同步
highlights: Added a guarded England-DR Congo line-ups visual prototype below Prediction, with team tabs, bench lists, coach and formation cards, player photos, card markers, and substitution previews.
Expanded the guarded line-ups visual prototype across yesterday and today, including a clear Line-ups (prediction) label for scheduled matches and past-match line-ups for finished knockouts.
Match detail sections now use subtle dividers and roomier Key information spacing so the new visual fits the existing page rhythm.
Synced Belgium-Senegal to the official 3-2 final, linked the official FOX highlight, and resolved Belgium's next knockout slot.
highlightsZh: 在 Prediction 下方新增受保护的英格兰对刚果民主共和国阵容可视化原型，包含球队切换、替补名单、教练与阵型卡、球员照片、红黄牌标记和换人预览。
受保护的阵容可视化原型已扩展到昨天和今天的比赛，未开赛比赛会明确显示“预测阵容”，已完赛淘汰赛则显示赛后阵容。
比赛详情区块现在使用更克制的分隔线，并增加 Key information 的呼吸感，让新视觉更贴合现有页面节奏。
已同步比利时对塞内加尔的官方 3-2 完赛比分，补上 FOX 官方集锦，并确认比利时的下一轮淘汰赛席位。

releases.title: England-DR Congo Result story and official highlight
releases.titleZh: 英格兰对刚果民主共和国赛果故事与官方集锦
highlights: England-DR Congo now has source-backed Result story bullets for Cipenga's early opener, England's pressure shift, and Kane's late comeback goals.
The Result card now links the verified official FOX Sports highlight upload.
highlightsZh: 英格兰对刚果民主共和国现在补上有来源支撑的赛果故事，涵盖奇彭加早早破门、英格兰压力转换和凯恩最后阶段逆转进球。
赛果卡片现在链接已核验的 FOX Sports 官方集锦上传。

releases.title: Live pill click tooltips
highlights: Live pills now open the official FIFA snapshot tooltip on click or tap across match rows and tournament cards, without sending people to the FIFA scores page.
highlightsZh: 直播标签现在会在比赛列表和 Tournament 卡片中通过点击或轻点打开官方 FIFA 快照提示，不再跳转到 FIFA 比分页。

releases.title: Mexico recap clarity
highlights: Mexico-Ecuador's Result recap now says the home crowd was lifted in Mexico City instead of relying on Azteca shorthand.
highlightsZh: 墨西哥对厄瓜多尔的赛果复盘现在直接写明墨西哥城主场球迷被带动，不再依赖 Azteca 这个简称。

releases.title: Archive Tournament cleanup
highlights: The 1974, 1978, and 1982 archived Tournament tabs now show only bracket and placement matches, keeping second-stage group pools out of the swipeable Tournament canvas.
Archived Groups still use those second-stage results to highlight who advanced through the older formats.
highlightsZh: 1974、1978 和 1982 年的历届 Tournament 视图现在只显示淘汰赛和名次赛，不再把第二阶段小组赛放进可滑动 Tournament 画布。
历届 Groups 仍会使用这些第二阶段赛果来标出旧赛制中真正晋级的球队。

releases.title: Archive first-round context
highlights: Historical first-round knockout matches from no-group World Cups, such as 1934 Preliminary round games, now omit the empty Previous group-round block while keeping the next-round path.
highlightsZh: 没有小组赛的历届世界杯首轮淘汰赛（如 1934 年预赛轮）现在不再显示空的 Previous 小组赛区块，同时保留下一轮路径。

releases.title: Historical key info headings
highlights: Past World Cup match details now give each country's Key information title a historical team-style description, so teams such as 1982 Italy no longer fall back to only the country name.
highlightsZh: 历届世界杯比赛详情现在会为每个国家的关键信息标题显示历史球队风格描述，像 1982 年意大利不会再只显示国家名。

releases.title: Mexico-Ecuador Result update
releases.titleZh: 墨西哥对厄瓜多尔赛果更新
highlights: Mexico-Ecuador now shows the verified final score, FIFA goal timeline, official FOX Sports highlights button, and source-backed Result story bullets.
Germany-Paraguay and Netherlands-Morocco Result stories now include source research records for their knockout shootout recaps.
highlightsZh: 墨西哥对厄瓜多尔现在显示已核验终场比分、FIFA 进球时间线、FOX Sports 官方集锦按钮和有来源支撑的赛果故事。
德国对巴拉圭、荷兰对摩洛哥的赛果故事现在也为淘汰赛点球复盘补上来源研究记录。

releases.title: Match title descender fix
releases.titleZh: 比赛标题字母下缘修正
highlights: Large matchup titles now give team-name descenders more room, so letters like the g in Senegal are not clipped.
highlightsZh: 大型对阵标题现在给球队名称中字母下缘留出更多空间，像 Senegal 里的 g 不会再被裁切。

releases.title: Faster juggle opening drop
highlights: The hidden soccer-ball juggle now starts with a quicker opening drop, closer to the pace of the ball after the first tap.
highlightsZh: 隐藏的足球颠球小游戏现在开局下落更快，更接近第一次点击后足球的节奏。

releases.title: Up-next score cleanup
highlights: Upcoming match rows now ignore provider pre-match 0-0 score shells, so an Up next fixture stays unscored until a live or final status is verified.
Validation, audit, and smoke checks now fail if scheduled/upcoming fixtures carry score artifacts or render conflicting score/status pills.
highlightsZh: 即将开始的比赛行现在会忽略数据源赛前返回的 0-0 占位比分，只有在核验为直播或完赛状态后才显示比分。
校验、审计和冒烟测试现在会拦截带有比分字段或渲染出冲突比分/状态标签的待赛比赛。

releases.title: Archive group advancement
highlights: Archived Groups tables now use the same green row treatment as 2026 for teams that actually reached the Tournament stage, including older one-winner groups, group-playoff winners, and final-round group qualifiers.
highlightsZh: 历届 Groups 表现在会像 2026 年一样，用绿色行标出真正进入 Tournament 阶段的球队，包括早期单一小组头名、小组附加赛胜者和决赛轮小组晋级球队。

releases.title: Prediction heading alignment
highlights: Mobile info cards now keep the Prediction source info button vertically centered with the heading while preserving the Result play button alignment.
highlightsZh: 移动端信息卡现在会让 Prediction 来源信息按钮与标题垂直居中，同时保留 Result 播放按钮的对齐效果。

releases.title: Archive tournament brackets
highlights: The 1954 and 1958 archived Tournament tabs now start at the real knockout bracket, keeping group tie-breaker play-offs out of the bracket columns and quarter-final Previous context.
highlightsZh: 1954 和 1958 年的历届 Tournament 视图现在从真正的淘汰赛阶段开始，不再把小组附加赛放进对阵列或四分之一决赛的 Previous 语境。

releases.title: Live pill hover
highlights: Live match rows and tournament cards no longer shift while the Live pill time tooltip is targeted on desktop.
highlightsZh: 桌面端指向 Live 标签的比赛时间提示时，直播比赛行和 Tournament 卡片不再位移。

releases.title: Archive kickoff times
highlights: Past World Cup match rows now show researched local kickoff times when Wikidata match-item time-of-day data is available, including the 1930 Uruguay-Yugoslavia semi-final.
Cancelled date-only archive fixtures stay blank instead of showing an invented fallback time.
highlightsZh: 历届世界杯比赛行现在会在 Wikidata 比赛条目提供开球时间时显示已研究核验的当地开球时间，包括 1930 年乌拉圭对南斯拉夫的半决赛。
已取消且只有日期的存档赛程会保持空白，不显示推算出来的占位时间。

releases.title: Result-story research queue
highlights: The FIFA sync workflow now reports finished matches that still need source-backed Result story research after scorer and official-video sync.
The Result card keeps the verified score, scorer timeline, and official video without publishing generic story filler while researched bullets are pending.
Researched current-match recaps now favor short, natural sentences and reject colon/dash-shaped summary prose.
highlightsZh: FIFA 同步流程现在会在射手和官方视频同步后，报告仍需要来源支撑的 Result 故事研究的完赛比赛。
研究型故事待补充时，Result 卡片会保留已核验比分、进球时间线和官方视频，但不会发布泛泛的故事填充文案。
经过研究的当前比赛复盘现在会采用更短、更自然的句子，并拒绝冒号或破折号式的摘要腔。

releases.title: Juggle game difficulty
highlights: The hidden soccer-ball juggle now keeps ramping after longer streaks, with subtly stronger kicks, quicker drops, and messier side-wall bounce recovery.
highlightsZh: 隐藏的足球颠球小游戏现在会在更长连击后继续轻微提高难度，踢球更有力、下落更快，撞到侧边后的恢复也更乱。

releases.title: France result recap
highlights: France-Sweden now shows the 3-0 full-time score, the scorer timeline, and a tighter Result recap centered on Mbappe's super-goal opener and Olise's two assists.
The Result card now links the official FOX Sports YouTube highlights once the verified upload is available.
Current-match story bullets now stay out of the automatic post-FT path until source-backed research writes them; scorer and assist facts can still update from the official FIFA timeline.
highlightsZh: 法国对瑞典现在显示 3-0 全场比分、进球时间线，并用更紧凑的赛果复盘突出姆巴佩的神仙首球和奥利塞的两次助攻。
经过核验的 FOX Sports 官方 YouTube 集锦上线后，赛果卡片现在会显示播放按钮。
当前比赛的赛果故事要等有来源支撑的赛后研究写入后才会发布；射手和助攻事实仍可从 FIFA 官方时间线自动更新。

releases.title: Official archive videos
highlights: More 2018 and 2022 archive matches now show official FIFA YouTube highlights, while non-FIFA uploads remain hidden.
highlightsZh: 更多 2018 和 2022 年历届比赛现在会显示 FIFA 官方 YouTube 集锦；非 FIFA 上传的视频仍会隐藏。

releases.title: Tie wording consistency
highlights: Prediction bars, head-to-head records, standings help, and knockout result summaries now use Tie instead of Draw across English views.
highlightsZh: 英文界面的预测条、交锋记录、积分榜说明和淘汰赛赛果摘要现在统一使用 Tie，不再使用 Draw。

releases.title: Historical player photos
highlights: More past World Cup player cards now use verified Wikipedia/Wikimedia photos, including targeted Final and Semi-finals scorer, key-player, and team-description mentions while ambiguous image matches stay as initials.

A new exact-title batch lookup plus a Wikidata P18 Commons fallback expands historical player photo coverage past 2,500 cards while rejecting known team-lineup, same-name, and non-profile image matches.
Historical photo coverage metadata now records the Finals/Semi-finals target set separately from the all-profile photo count.
highlightsZh: 更多历届世界杯球员卡片现在会使用已核验的 Wikipedia/Wikimedia 照片，包括针对决赛和半决赛射手、关键球员以及球队描述提及球员的补图；有歧义的图片匹配会继续保留首字母头像。
新的精确标题批量查找加上 Wikidata P18 Commons 兜底，把历届球员照片覆盖率提升到 2,500 张以上，同时会拒绝已知的全队合影、同名误配和非个人头像匹配。
历届照片覆盖率元数据现在会把决赛/半决赛目标名单与全部球员卡照片总数分开记录。

releases.title: Archive first-meeting copy
highlights: Past World Cup archive sections now label their scope and first meetings say the teams had not met in a men's World Cup before that match, while current fixtures keep verified senior-international H2H wording.
highlightsZh: 历届世界杯交锋区块现在会标明范围，首次交锋也会说明双方此前没有男足世界杯交锋；当前赛程仍保留已核验成年队交锋文案。

releases.title: Archive knockout path emphasis
highlights: Past World Cup Next-path lines now semibold the resolved opponent winner, matching the current tournament treatment.
highlightsZh: 历届世界杯的下一轮路径文案现在会加粗已确认晋级的对手，和当前赛事保持一致。

releases.title: Tooltip card layering
highlights: Tournament, standings, match-detail, and match-list tooltips now lift their host card or row above neighboring cards while visible.
highlightsZh: 淘汰赛、积分榜、比赛详情和比赛列表中的提示框现在显示时会把所属卡片或行提升到相邻卡片之上。

releases.title: Standings year heading
highlights: The Standings page heading now shows only the selected year with a dropdown chevron, matching the compact Today date picker style on Matches.
highlightsZh: 积分榜页面标题现在只显示所选年份并带下拉箭头，与 Matches 中紧凑的“今天”日期选择样式保持一致。

releases.title: Tournament Live time tooltip
highlights: Desktop hover on the tournament-card Live badge now shows the same official FIFA snapshot minute when MatchTime is available.
highlightsZh: 桌面端悬停淘汰赛卡片上的 Live 标记时，现在会在 FIFA MatchTime 可用时显示同样的官方快照分钟。

releases.title: Brazil-Norway projection repair
highlights: Brazil vs Norway now has its ranking-based prediction loaded, and the data pipeline now refreshes projections whenever confirmed fixtures update.
highlightsZh: 巴西对挪威现在已加载基于排名的预测；数据流水线也会在已确认赛程更新时刷新预测。

releases.title: Knockout path ranking pills
highlights: Next-round path copy now shows FIFA ranking pills for both the winning opponent and the defeated team named in that result.
highlightsZh: 下一轮路径文案现在会为已晋级对手和该赛果中被击败的球队都显示 FIFA 排名标签。

releases.title: Norway advance update
highlights: Norway's 2-1 win over Côte d'Ivoire now updates the score, goal timeline, official highlight link, Brazil-Norway H2H context, and a sourced Result recap around Nusa, Diallo, Haaland, and Nyland.
highlightsZh: 挪威 2-1 战胜科特迪瓦后，现在已更新比分、进球时间线、官方集锦链接、巴西对挪威的交锋背景，并补充围绕努萨、迪亚洛、哈兰德和尼兰的来源支撑赛果复盘。

releases.title: Result recap reliability
highlights: Fresh full-time recaps now keep opener, equalizer, and late-winner bullets in match order before the enriched JSON lands.
Result enrichment checks now fail scoring-match recaps with too few story bullets or out-of-order goal-minute bullets.
highlightsZh: 刚结束比赛的复盘现在会在富化 JSON 到达前，也按开场进球、扳平、绝杀的顺序展示要点。
赛果富化检查现在会拦截要点过少或进球分钟顺序错乱的有进球复盘。

releases.title: Standings reliability
highlights: Standings badge checks now use stable team identity behind the scenes, keeping the release pipeline reliable across language changes.
highlightsZh: 积分榜标记检查现在会在后台使用稳定的球队身份，让发布流水线在语言切换后也保持可靠。

releases.title: Language switch feedback
highlights: English/Chinese switching now shows a subtle spinner on the selected language tab while the page rerenders.
highlightsZh: 英文/中文切换现在会在所选语言标签上显示轻量加载提示，直到页面完成重绘。

releases.title: Chinese route player links
highlights: Chinese result bullets now keep short route labels like Hakimi-Brahim while linking each player to the hover card.
highlightsZh: 中文赛果要点现在会保留哈基米-布拉欣这类短路线名称，同时把每名球员链接到悬浮卡。

releases.title: Archived bracket alignment
highlights: Past tournament brackets now place the Final and 3rd place match on the same centered end path as the 2026 tournament view.
highlightsZh: 历届赛事淘汰赛现在会像 2026 赛事视图一样，将决赛和季军赛放在居中的同一条终点路径上。

releases.title: Mobile top spacing alignment
highlights: Matches and Standings now start from the same mobile content offset below the top navigation.
highlightsZh: 移动端 Matches 和 Standings 现在会在顶部导航下方使用一致的内容起始间距。

releases.title: Mobile Live time tooltip
highlights: Tapping a Live pill on mobile now opens the FIFA snapshot time tooltip first instead of immediately leaving the app.
highlightsZh: 移动端点击 Live 标记现在会先打开 FIFA 快照时间提示，不会立即离开应用。

releases.title: Mobile tournament status badges
releases.titleZh: 移动端淘汰赛状态标记
highlights: Tournament Live and Up next badges now use the same compact sizing on small mobile screens.
highlightsZh: 淘汰赛 Live 和 Up next 标记现在会在小屏移动端使用一致的紧凑尺寸。

releases.title: Automatic H2H sync
highlights: Resolved knockout matchups now sync verified senior head-to-head records from National Football Teams, clearing the Mexico-Ecuador pending card and the current resolved H2H backlog.
Synced H2H records now exclude the fixture itself, keeping past-meeting summaries strictly before the selected match.
highlightsZh: 已确定的淘汰赛对阵现在会从 National Football Teams 同步已核实的成年队交锋记录，清除了墨西哥对厄瓜多尔的待补充卡片以及当前已确定对阵的交锋积压。
同步的交锋记录现在会排除比赛本身，确保历史交锋摘要只统计所选比赛之前的交手。

releases.title: Next path winner emphasis
highlights: Resolved Next path lines now semibold the known opponent winner, so entries like Paraguay advancing on penalties match the Previous context emphasis.
highlightsZh: 已确定的“下一轮”路径现在会半粗显示对手胜者，让点球晋级的巴拉圭等文案与“上一轮”背景强调保持一致。

releases.title: Chinese detail localization
highlights: Chinese Catch Up, Result details, H2H competition labels, shootout score notes, and tactical-route lines now localize before display, while mobile standings help tooltips stay inside the match card.
highlightsZh: 中文“速览”、“赛果”详情、交锋赛事标签、点球比分注记和战术路径句现在会先本地化再展示，同时移动端积分榜帮助提示会保持在比赛卡片内。

releases.title: H2H empty-state copy
highlights: Pending H2H cards now show a concise not-loaded message instead of internal research instructions, with Chinese fallback coverage for empty states.
highlightsZh: 待补充的交锋卡片现在显示简洁的尚未载入提示，不再展示内部研究说明，并补齐空状态的中文兜底。

releases.title: Past 24 hours layout
highlights: Past 24 hours match cards now stay in one full-width column on desktop and mobile.
highlightsZh: “过去24小时”的比赛卡片现在在桌面端和移动端都保持单列全宽显示。

releases.title: Smarter country search
highlights: Country search now recognizes lightweight pinyin, traditional Chinese, and common alternate names while keeping exact aliases and short English prefixes precise.
highlightsZh: 国家队搜索现在支持轻量拼音、繁体中文和常见别名，同时让精确别名和短英文前缀保持准确。

releases.title: Archive card context
highlights: Archived knockout match details now use the same Previous and Next context style as current World Cup cards, with Result shown below that path context.
Archived Previous knockout context now semibolds the teams that advanced, matching current World Cup path summaries.
Replay-era and 1950 final-round archive cards now show replay or standings context instead of forcing a modern bracket path.
Historical archive tables now use era-appropriate win points.
Hidden player-card tooltips no longer widen archived match details before a player name is hovered.
highlightsZh: 历届淘汰赛比赛详情现在使用与当前世界杯卡片一致的“上一轮”和“下一轮”背景样式，并将“赛果”显示在路径背景下方。
历届“上一轮”淘汰赛背景现在会半粗显示晋级球队，与当前世界杯路径摘要保持一致。
重赛年代和1950年决赛轮的存档卡片现在显示重赛或积分榜背景，而不是强行套用现代淘汰赛路径。
历届存档积分榜现在使用对应年代的胜场积分规则。
隐藏的球员卡片提示现在不会在悬停前撑宽历届比赛详情。

releases.title: Mobile heading spacing
highlights: On mobile, the Today heading now uses the same top-navigation spacing as the standings year heading while desktop spacing stays unchanged.
highlightsZh: 移动端的“今天”标题现在与积分榜年份标题使用一致的顶部导航间距，同时桌面端间距保持不变。

releases.title: Archived tournament tabs
highlights: Archived standings years now include a Tournament tab, so years like 2010 and 2022 open on their completed knockout bracket while Groups remains available.
highlightsZh: 历届年份的积分榜现在也包含“淘汰赛”页签，因此2010、2022等年份会先打开已完赛淘汰赛对阵，同时仍可切回小组积分榜。

releases.title: Cleaner shootout recaps
releases.titleZh: 更自然的点球大战速览
highlights: Current and historical penalty-shootout Result bullets now keep the scorer timeline, add matchup-specific texture when available, and avoid generic eliminated-after-penalties filler.
Past World Cup archive recaps were refreshed so scoreless ties and shootouts no longer pad Result blocks with repeated locked-together or plain shootout-outcome lines.
Finished-match recap audits now catch weak story filler in both the 2026 tournament and historical archive.
highlightsZh: 当前赛事和历届存档的点球大战“赛果”速览现在会保留进球时间线，在可用时加入对阵特点，并避免泛泛的点球出局填充句。
历届世界杯存档速览已刷新，因此0-0平局和点球大战不再用重复的胶着到终场或普通点球结果句填充“赛果”区。
完赛比赛速览审计现在会同时检查2026赛事和历届存档中的弱故事句。

releases.title: Mobile tournament polish
highlights: On mobile tournament cards, the Up next badge now uses smaller text so it stays compact without changing the approved desktop card styling.
highlightsZh: 移动端淘汰赛卡片的“即将开始”标签现在使用更小文字，让标签更紧凑，同时保留桌面端已确认的卡片样式。

releases.title: Smarter result recaps
highlights: Finished match Result blocks now show a semibold score line, scorer timeline, and three plain-text recap bullets without emoji markers.
Completed current matches now include a Result play button when FOX Sports has an official YouTube highlights video.
Germany-Paraguay and Netherlands-Morocco now link their official FOX Sports Round of 32 highlight videos.
Official FOX Sports highlight lookup now runs in the matchday and scheduled sync paths, so newly finished matches keep checking for a safe YouTube link automatically.
Completed matches without an official YouTube upload now carry an explicit checked status so missing play buttons are deliberate, not silent data gaps.
Historical archive matches now show the same Result play button after an all-match official FIFA YouTube sweep, with unchecked or non-highlight videos kept out of the UI.
App asset cache keys now point at the official highlight sync build so refreshed highlight-video data reaches the browser immediately.
Chinese result bullets now translate penalty-shootout and archive recap sentence shapes through shared rules, with copy audits covering both current and historical tournaments.
Tied knockout results now say when a team advanced after a tie if the official feed has not exposed a shootout total yet.
Next-round knockout cards now name an already-known future opponent with the result they advanced by, while unresolved paths still say winner of the pending matchup.
Live FIFA score updates now carry penalty-shootout totals too, knockout rows show the compact 1-1 (3-4 pens) style with freshness, and bracket result pills now match that scoreline style.
The live-data endpoint now fails safely to the committed fallback snapshot instead of serving a Vercel timeout page when FIFA's official API is slow.
Knockout match rows no longer show the redundant Predicted chip when unresolved Winner match paths already make the projection clear.
Brazil vs Japan now has richer story bullets for Japan's defensive pressure, the early Sano opener, and Brazil's late Martinelli winner.

Historical World Cup result pages now use generated story bullets too, so archive matches such as Russia vs Egypt 2018 mention the own goal, Dzyuba finish, and Salah penalty instead of generic points lines.

Archived World Cup Result blocks now match current-match recap structure with a semibold score line, scorer row, bullet story facts, and player-card mentions that do not jump to the raw GitHub dataset.
Archived knockout match context now uses the round name directly instead of the extra Knockout context archive heading.
highlightsZh: 完赛比赛的“赛果”区现在显示半粗比分句、进球时间线，以及三条不带表情符号的文字速览。
当前赛事已完赛比赛在 FOX Sports 有官方 YouTube 集锦时，现在会在“赛果”旁显示播放按钮。
德国对巴拉圭、荷兰对摩洛哥现在已接入 FOX Sports 官方32强赛集锦视频。
FOX Sports 官方集锦查询现在已接入比赛日和定时同步流程，新完赛比赛会自动持续查找安全的 YouTube 链接。
已完赛但暂无官方 YouTube 集锦的比赛现在会记录明确的检查状态，因此没有播放按钮是有意状态，而不是静默数据缺口。
历届世界杯存档比赛现在经过全量官方 FIFA YouTube 检查；只有匹配到官方集锦类视频时才会在“赛果”旁显示同样的播放按钮。
应用资源缓存键现在指向官方集锦同步版本，让刷新后的集锦视频数据能立即进入浏览器。
中文赛果速览现在会通过共享规则翻译点球大战和存档赛事句式，文案审计也会同时覆盖当前赛事与历届世界杯。
淘汰赛打平但官方数据尚未给出点球总比分时，现在会说明哪支球队在平局后晋级。
淘汰赛下一轮卡片现在会在未来对手已确定时写出该队和晋级比分，路径未决时仍保留“对阵某场胜者”的说法。
FIFA 实时比分更新现在也会带上点球大战总比分，淘汰赛行会用带新鲜度提示的 1-1（3-4 点球）样式展示，对阵图赛果标签也会匹配这种比分样式。
当 FIFA 官方 API 响应较慢时，实时数据接口现在会安全回退到已提交的备用数据，而不是显示 Vercel 超时页面。
淘汰赛比赛行在“某场胜者”等路径已经说明未决时，不再额外显示冗余的“预测”标签。
巴西对日本现在加入更具体的比赛故事，包括日本的防守压力、佐野海舟先开纪录，以及马丁内利最后阶段制胜。
历届世界杯赛果页现在也使用生成的故事速览，因此俄罗斯对埃及这样的2018存档比赛会提到乌龙球、久巴进球和萨拉赫点球，而不是泛泛的积分文案。
历届世界杯存档的“赛果”区现在与当前比赛保持一致：半粗比分句、进球时间线、项目符号故事事实，以及不会跳转到原始 GitHub 数据集的球员卡片提及。
历届世界杯存档的淘汰赛背景现在直接使用轮次名称，不再显示额外的“淘汰赛背景 / 存档”标题。

releases.title: Admin message banner
highlights: A clean light-grey admin note can now appear below the top navigation for time-boxed updates, then collapse smoothly after dismissal.
highlightsZh: 顶部导航下方现在可以显示简洁的浅灰色站内消息，用于有起止时间的临时更新，关闭后会平滑收起。

releases.title: Knockout path rankings
highlights: Knockout match info now removes inline flags from Previous and Next path copy, then adds compact FIFA ranking pills beside the referenced opponent countries.
Round of 32 group-round summaries now read with scores in the sentence, such as South Africa won 1-0 against South Korea, while the selected matchup teams avoid duplicate ranking pills.
Previous and Next path ranking pills now sit vertically centered, closer to the team name, and spaced away from following punctuation.

Projected knockout matchups now explain their predicted status in match details, keep confirmed source matches scheduled, and switch Final or third-place teams to real winners or runners-up once those results are in.
Completed knockout tiles now mute the finished card and losing team, keep the advancing team in color, and replace prediction pills with a compact final-score pill.
Completed knockout result notes now describe advancement and elimination, so Round of 32 and later matches no longer use group-stage points language.
Catch Up now opens immediately with skeleton rows, then fills in the news feed after the items finish rendering.
On mobile, tapping tournament percentage tooltips such as PAR 25% now opens only the tooltip, and tapping elsewhere closes it without jumping to the match page.
Mobile tournament bracket scrolling now stays pinned at the page top instead of exposing extra white space above the navigation.
Tournament outcome percentage pills now use three-letter codes like USA, TIE, and BIH instead of flag emoji labels.
highlightsZh: 淘汰赛比赛信息现在移除“上一轮”和“下一轮”路径文案里的行内旗帜，并在被提到的对手国家旁加入紧凑的FIFA排名标签。
32强的小组赛总结现在把比分直接写进句子，例如南非1-0击败韩国，同时当前对阵双方不会重复显示排名标签。
“上一轮”和“下一轮”路径里的排名标签现在会与周围句子文字垂直居中，对球队名更贴近，并与后面的标点留出间距。
预测中的淘汰赛对阵现在会在比赛详情中说明“预测”状态，已确认的来源比赛仍标为赛程，并在决赛或季军赛来源结果产生后自动切换为真实胜者或负者。
已完赛的淘汰赛卡片现在会弱化整张卡和出局球队，保留晋级球队的彩色显示，并用紧凑的最终比分标签替代预测标签。
已完赛的淘汰赛结果说明现在改为描述晋级和出局，因此32强及后续比赛不再使用小组赛积分文案。
“速览”现在会立即打开并显示骨架行，然后在新闻列表渲染完成后填入内容。
移动端点击 PAR 25% 等淘汰赛百分比提示现在只会打开提示框，点击其他位置会关闭它，不会误跳到比赛页。
移动端淘汰赛对阵图滚动现在会稳稳停在页面顶部，不再在导航上方露出额外空白。
淘汰赛结果百分比标签现在使用 USA、TIE、BIH 这样的三字母代码，不再使用旗帜表情。

releases.title: Final group-stage bracket
releases.titleZh: 小组赛完结后的对阵更新
highlights: Standings now opens with Tournament first, followed by Groups and Third-Place Race, after the final group-stage results locked every Round of 32 matchup.
Third-Place Race now replaces Games Left and Chance with a simple Status column showing Advancing or Eliminated, with shorter final-state tooltips.
Group standings keep each third-place race rank pill, but the pill now explains Advancing or Not advancing without stacking a separate Eliminated pill on the same row.
Round of 32 match info now keeps the clickable round label as a simple underline and semibolds each team's name at the start of its group-round summary.
Chinese key-information cards now translate the latest compact Round of 32 matchup notes, including Neymar, Kubo, and Davies availability context.
Clicking a knockout round label in match details now opens the Tournament tab and briefly highlights the matching bracket card.
Tournament bracket connector lines are restored with clearer, rounded rails between rounds.
The third-place match now appears below the Final in the tournament column, with runner-up paths from both semi-finals.
Future knockout cards now show three outcome pills from Round of 32 through the Final: home win, Tie, and away win, with penalty-shootout context on the Tie pill.
The Final and third-place cards now sit in the middle lane of the final column instead of lining up directly beside the two semi-finals.
The Final and third-place cards now sit closer together in the final column, and the third-place card labels the kickoff as 3rd place match.
Tournament connector rails now use one consistent opaque gray stroke so joins stay aligned without darker overlap marks.
Tournament outcome pills now stay neutral gray, use compact flag-plus-percent labels, and show shorter card-bounded tooltips.
Tie-pill shootout tooltips now use researched penalty takers and only mention a goalkeeper when that keeper has a true shootout profile.
Close knockout projections now describe slight edges instead of calling near-even teams upset picks.
Tournament connector rails now retry after first-load layout settles, so direct Tournament links draw the bracket lines immediately.
Official FIFA participants now keep the Round of 32 pairings current, including Germany-Paraguay, France-Sweden, Belgium-Senegal, and Switzerland-Algeria.
highlightsZh: 小组赛最终结果锁定全部32强对阵后，积分榜现在先显示淘汰赛，再显示小组和第三名竞争。
第三名竞争现在用简单的“状态”列替代“剩余场次”和“晋级机会”，只显示晋级或小组赛出局，并使用更短的最终状态提示。
小组积分榜保留每支第三名球队的竞争排名标签，但标签现在说明晋级或未晋级，不再在同一行叠加单独的出局标签。
32强比赛信息里的轮次标签现在保持简单下划线，且每队小组赛总结开头的队名改为半粗体。
中文关键信息卡现在会翻译最新的32强紧凑对阵文案，包括内马尔、久保建英和戴维斯的出场情况。
点击比赛详情里的淘汰赛轮次标签时，现在会打开淘汰赛页签，并短暂高亮对应的对阵卡。
淘汰赛对阵之间的连接线已恢复为更清晰的圆角线。
第三名比赛现在显示在决赛下方，并从两场半决赛连出落败方路径。
未来淘汰赛卡片现在从32强到决赛都显示主队取胜、平局、客队取胜三个结果标签，平局标签会说明点球路径。
决赛和第三名比赛卡片现在位于最后一列的中间通道，不再直接与两场半决赛横向对齐。
决赛和第三名比赛卡片现在在最后一列中更靠近彼此，第三名比赛会在开球时间旁标注季军赛。
淘汰赛连接线现在使用统一的不透明浅灰色，让交汇处保持对齐且不会出现更深的重叠痕迹。
淘汰赛结果标签现在统一为灰色，使用更紧凑的旗帜加百分比文案，并显示更短且限制在卡片内的提示。
平局标签的点球提示现在使用查证过的点球手，只有门将确实具备点球大战履历时才会提到门将。
接近五五开的淘汰赛预测现在会说明“略占优势”，不再把接近的球队说成爆冷。
淘汰赛连接线现在会在首次载入布局稳定后自动重试绘制，直接打开淘汰赛页也会立即显示对阵线。
官方FIFA参赛队信息现在会保持32强对阵最新，包括德国-巴拉圭、法国-瑞典、比利时-塞内加尔和瑞士-阿尔及利亚。

releases.title: Mobile tournament canvas
highlights: Small-screen Tournament now behaves like a draggable canvas, and dragging past the bottom hands scrolling back to the page instead of trapping you inside the bracket.
highlightsZh: 小屏幕淘汰赛现在像可拖动画布一样操作，拖到画布底部后会继续滚动页面，不会被困在对阵区域内。

releases.title: Third-place tooltip consistency
highlights: Third-place standings pills now use the same analyst-style advancement tooltip as the race table, so match details, standings, and the race explain the same path.
highlightsZh: 第三名积分榜标签现在与竞争表使用同一套分析式晋级提示，让比赛详情、积分榜和竞争表说明同一条路径。

releases.title: Chinese card localization
highlights: Chinese player hover cards now localize compound position, club, and league lines instead of leaving English role or Scottish club text.
highlightsZh: 中文球员悬停卡现在会本地化复合位置、俱乐部和联赛行，不再残留英文角色或苏格兰俱乐部文字。

releases.title: Race, cards, and mobile brackets
releases.titleZh: 竞争、球员卡与移动端对阵
highlights: Browser Back and Forward now move through app states like Standings, selected match cards, and country search instead of leaving the app.
Mobile Tournament now opens as a compact swipeable bracket board with connector lines and round-to-round shifts instead of a one-column list.
Knockout calendar slots now auto-fill countries once group or source-match results make the participant certain.
Locked Tournament bracket cards now keep confirmed countries in full color, remove duplicate round labels, and leave unresolved Round of 32 slots muted as projections.
Locked bracket cards now open the matching date, row, and info card, and knockout round labels in match details link back to the Tournament bracket.
Knockout match details now replace the placeholder context with group-round form, prior-round source matches, and the next winner path.
Unconfirmed Round of 32 opponents now stay as slot labels in match-detail group summaries until their place is locked.
Unconfirmed matchup key-information cards now explain that the copy will be populated once the matchup is confirmed.
Knockout info cards now show country flags beside team names in group-form, source-match, and next-path summaries.
Confirmed knockout fixtures now automatically receive ranking projections, key-player watchlists, H2H research-pending states, and matchup-aware key information.
South Africa vs Canada match details now show the verified 2007 senior H2H result instead of the research-pending placeholder.
Projected Round of 16 and later countries now stay muted until their source match winner is confirmed.
Completed groups now reuse the archived green advancement row highlight for confirmed Round of 32 teams.
Third-place race badges now say whether a path is still open, how many matches are left, and the best-case points ceiling.
Third-place race now shows each team's games left beside the estimated Round of 32 advancing percentage and explains the simple remaining-match scenario model on hover.
Home match rows now hide ranking pills, keep cramped mobile live rows readable with a compact two-line matchup layout, and move compact world-ranking pills into the selected match card title.
World-ranking pills now explain on hover that they are FIFA rankings used for the 2026 tournament view.
Player hover cards now show the player country's flag beside the name, while historical cards keep archive-note wording.
Chinese player-card skill pills now translate generated role labels instead of showing raw English.
highlightsZh: 浏览器后退和前进现在会在积分榜、已选比赛卡和国家队搜索等应用状态之间切换，不会直接离开应用。
移动端淘汰赛现在是紧凑的可滑动对阵板，保留连接线和轮次切换动效，不再显示为单列列表。
当小组或上轮淘汰赛结果已经确定参赛队时，淘汰赛日历席位现在会自动填入国家队。
已锁定的淘汰赛对阵卡现在会让确认球队保持全彩显示，并移除重复轮次标签；尚未确定的32强席位仍以灰色预测样式呈现。
已锁定的对阵卡现在会打开对应日期、比赛行和信息卡，比赛详情里的淘汰赛轮次标签也可跳回淘汰赛对阵。
淘汰赛比赛详情现在会用小组赛表现、上一轮来源比赛和下一轮胜者路径替代占位说明。
尚未确认的32强对手现在会在比赛详情的小组摘要中保留为席位名称，直到席位锁定后才显示国家队。
尚未确认对阵的关键信息卡现在会说明，对阵确认后再补充文案。
淘汰赛信息卡现在会在小组表现、来源比赛和下一轮路径摘要中的队名旁显示国旗。
确认球队的淘汰赛现在会自动补入排名预测、重点球员观察名单、交锋待研究状态和对阵关键信息。
南非对加拿大的比赛详情现在显示已核验的 2007 年成年队交锋结果，不再显示待研究占位说明。
16强及后续轮次的预测球队现在会保持灰色显示，直到来源比赛胜者确认。
已完赛小组现在会沿用存档赛事的绿色晋级行高亮来标记确认进入32强的球队。
最佳第三名竞争标签现在会说明是否仍有出线路径、还剩几场比赛，以及最好情况的积分上限。
最佳第三名竞争现在会在预计进入32强百分比旁显示每队剩余场次，并在提示中解释简单的剩余比赛场景模型。
首页比赛行现在隐藏排名标签；移动端实时比赛在队名与状态标签过挤时会切换为紧凑的两行对阵布局，选中的比赛卡标题会显示更紧凑的世界排名标签。
世界排名标签现在可悬停说明：这是本2026赛事视图使用的FIFA排名。
球员悬停卡现在会在姓名旁显示球员国家旗帜，历史球员卡也保留档案说明的表述。
中文球员卡的技能标签现在会翻译生成的角色文案，不再显示原始英文。

releases.title: Curated player-card rollout
highlights: All 48 current tournament teams now have 26 audited profile overrides each before curated cards appear in the app.
Player-card matching now respects aliases, team-specific names, and historical tournament/team versions to avoid showing the wrong profile.
Projected later-round bracket paths and the third-place race now explain provisional status, top-eight cutoffs, and tiebreakers in English and Chinese.
highlightsZh: 当前赛事的 48 支球队现在各有 26 张通过审核的资料覆盖，只有通过国家工作流后才会在应用中显示精选球员卡。
球员卡匹配现在会识别别名、球队限定姓名，以及历史赛事/球队版本，避免显示错误资料。
后续轮次预测路径和最佳第三名竞争现在会用中英文说明临时状态、前八晋级线和同分规则。

releases.title: Official live-score corrections
highlights: Live scores now apply FIFA official score/status corrections after the general provider sync.
Provider-only score drift can now be corrected before scorer timelines and standings are recomputed.

Live group standings now reflect in-progress scores with FIFA head-to-head tiebreakers, flag third-place candidates in active matches, explain race rank on hover, and mathematically mark eliminated teams as soon as every group-stage path is closed.
Live standings badges now stay grouped on narrow screens, and Past 24 hours fades with other non-live rows while live matches are in focus.
The live-data API now reports how many FIFA official score corrections ran.
highlightsZh: 实时比分现在会在通用数据源同步后应用 FIFA 官方比分和状态校正。
单一数据源的比分偏差现在会在进球时间线和积分榜重新计算前被校正。
小组实时积分榜现在会按 FIFA 交锋优先的规则反映进行中的比分，标记正在比赛的第三名候选球队，可悬停查看排名原因，并在所有小组出线路径被数学封死时立即标记已淘汰球队。
实时积分榜徽章现在会在窄屏上保持成组显示，且实时比赛聚焦时，“过去 24 小时”会与其他非实时行一起淡化。
实时数据 API 现在会报告本次运行了多少项 FIFA 官方比分校正。

releases.title: Loading polish
highlights: Release notes now use the same rounded skeleton loading style as the rest of the app.
Third-place standings now show table-shaped loading rows instead of an empty body.
The tournament bracket now shows bracket-shaped loading cards while standings data loads.
highlightsZh: 发布说明现在使用与应用其他区域一致的圆角骨架加载样式。
最佳第三名积分榜现在会显示表格形骨架行，而不是空白表体。
淘汰赛对阵在积分数据加载时会显示对阵形骨架卡片。

releases.title: Live scorer reliability
highlights: Live and final scorer matching now falls back from FIFA match IDs to match numbers, country IDs, and normalized team names.
FIFA timeline lookups now include the full UTC date window for late local kickoffs.
Colombia vs DR Congo now resolves Daniel Muñoz's 76th-minute winner from FIFA's official timeline.
highlightsZh: 实时和完场进球者匹配现在会从 FIFA 比赛 ID 依次回退到比赛编号、国家 ID 和标准化队名。
FIFA 时间线查询现在会覆盖本地晚场开球所需的完整 UTC 日期窗口。
哥伦比亚对阵刚果民主共和国现在会从 FIFA 官方时间线解析 Daniel Muñoz 第 76 分钟的制胜球。

releases.title: Historical player metadata
highlights: Historical player cards now show archive-age context and peak values when available.
Historical photos now use current-player, Transfermarkt, and curated Wikipedia/Wikimedia sources.
Footer source and release notes now stay in compact in-page tooltips.
highlightsZh: 历史球员卡现在会在可用时显示当届年龄背景和峰值身价。
历史照片现在使用现役球员、Transfermarkt，以及精选的 Wikipedia/Wikimedia 来源。
页脚来源和发布说明现在保留在紧凑的页面内提示框中。
